title: How a godly man carries success without losing himself
caption:
Most men don't lose themselves in the hard season. They lose themselves when things finally go right.

The applause changes you if you let it. The upgrade, the recognition, the room you're suddenly in — all of it is a solvent. And the man who was grounded on Monday when nothing was happening has to decide: is he still that man now?

Four things keep a man from drifting when things go well:

Stay tethered to God, not the results. The win didn't make you.

Keep the men who knew you before. They're the only ones who can tell you when you're starting to drift.

Use it to serve, not to signal. The platform is borrowed.

Hold it open-handed. "Humble yourselves before the Lord, and he will lift you up." — James 4:10.

The sequence goes that direction, not the reverse. Success held loose is a gift. Success held tight is an idol.

Save this for the season you need it.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #humility #discipline #scripture #christianity
